name: Wild Basmati Rice with Orange-Soy
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the rice using the liquids listed (water and orange juice).
2. Roast the nuts in a dry pan until golden brown.
3. Add the butter-flavored canola oil to the roasted nuts and white wine, stirring until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped cilantro.
5. Mix the cooked rice into the sauce mixture.
6. Serve with milder meat entrees and/or salads.
